scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); try { fs.unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); } catch(e) {} try { fs.unlinkSync('yarn.lock'); } catch(e) {} const agent = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!agent.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
